task_completion.description: Access the Nx Witness Web Admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open and displaying the Nx Witness Web Admin interface.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the audit logs in the Web Admin interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nx Witness Web Admin interface shows the Audit Trail, System Logs, or Event Log section.

task_completion.description: Locate the log entry for the 'Secure Lab Camera'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The audit trail displays a specific log entry mentioning access to the 'Secure Lab Camera'.

task_completion.description: Identify the username of the suspect who accessed the camera
task_completion.visual_evidence: The log entry for the 'Secure Lab Camera' clearly shows the username of the user who accessed it.

task_completion.description: Open the required report file for editing
task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal or text editor is open, targeting the file /home/ga/leak_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Write the suspect's username to the report file
task_completion.visual_evidence: The identified username is written into /home/ga/leak_report.txt.

integrity.description: The agent used the Nx Witness Web Admin interface to find the information
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent navigating the web interface to find the logs, rather than using terminal commands to search backend databases or files.

integrity.description: The agent did not attempt to access the ground truth file
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should not be seen trying to read or access /root/ground_truth_suspect.txt.

integrity.description: The agent wrote ONLY the username to the report file
integrity.visual_evidence: The file /home/ga/leak_report.txt should contain only the username (e.g., john.smith) without any additional text or explanation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The suspect is one of five hardcoded users: john.smith, sarah.connor, rick.deckard, ellen.ripley, james.bond. The agent must identify which one accessed the 'Secure Lab Camera' by viewing the audit trail in the Nx Witness Web Admin interface. The final answer must be written to /home/ga/leak_report.txt containing ONLY the username. The ground truth is stored in /root/ground_truth_suspect.txt, which the agent should not access.
